isi.lyrics:
Lyric aespa - Rich Man (English Ver.)

Romanization

My mom said to me,
“Find someone
who can give you everything”
And I said,
“Mom, I already have everything”
I am a Rich Man
I am a Rich Man

I am a Rich Man
Imma carry myself
I am a Rich Man
Imma carry myself
I am a Rich Man
I’m my own biggest fan
and I’m high in demand
I am a Rich Man

Don’t care about what they say
They tryna mess up
But can’t touch mine
They need what I made
See, my name is
Where my name is
I am a Rich Man
That’s me
Yeah I’m reckless
Got a strong mind,
Pressure don’t shake me
I got focus in my mind
Runnin’ to the sign
It’s no drama
Exit is my next step

No distraction,
Just self-belief
‘Cause that is
how I got everything
Wooah Huh
I am a Rich Man
So I am standin’
where you’re lookin’
Always on point
My perfect fit
Baby

Imma carry myself

Imma carry myself
I am a Rich Man
I'm that one
